_comment: Agile-track config overlay. Merge over ../config.json — every key not listed here (models, severity, deadlock, stack, rollback.mechanism, budget) is inherited unchanged from the root config. Only keys under 'agile' and the requirements-artifact override are new.

feature._comment: Same fields as root config.feature; backlog replaces the flat requirements file.

wipLimit._comment: Frontier width, not queue depth: max slices simultaneously in_progress or gated across the whole ready frontier. A human-set guardrail, adjusted between runs via LEARNING.md — never auto-tuned at runtime.

disposability._comment: Governs rollback economics for slices. See protocol.md §6.

sideEffectFirewall._comment: Default-deny for anything with effects outside the worktree. See protocol.md §6.2.

foundationSlice._comment: A slice is flagged as foundation (priority scheduling + review) when its fan-out (number of dependent slices) meets this threshold.
